name: Oriental Sausage and Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Chicken broth OR 3 cups water
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the sausage into a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Add onion, bell pepper, and drained mushrooms to the casserole.
3. Cover and microwave on high for 5-7 minutes, stirring once.
4. Drain any excess liquid from the vegetables and set aside.
5. In a separate bowl, combine soy sauce, rice, drained water chestnuts, and chicken broth (or water).
6. Stir until everything is well combined.
7. Cover and microwave on high for 6-7 minutes.
8. Remove the bowl from the microwave and stir again.
9. Return the vegetable mixture to the casserole dish.
10. Cover and microwave on medium power (50%) for 30-35 minutes, stirring occasionally.
11. Stir in the sausage mix, cover, and microwave on medium for an additional 15-20 minutes until the rice is tender and dry.
